test.note: 223 tests passed across 16 test files. All notification email tests pass.

typecheck.note: Biome check passed with no issues.

lint.note: Biome lint check passed with no issues.

build.note: Frontend build succeeded with no errors.

blockingIssues.description: Handoff references wrong commit: The handoff for end-to-end-validation (polish milestone) references commitId '191c22c' which is titled 'test: user testing validation for audit-trail milestone'. This commit does not contain any polish milestone or cross-area validation evidence (VAL-CROSS-001 through VAL-CROSS-005). However, validation-state.json shows all cross-area flows (VAL-CROSS-001 through 005) are actually PASSED - they were validated in their respective milestones (document-management, service-request-lifecycle, notifications, audit-trail). This is a documentation/commit-reference issue, not a code issue.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: The actual validation work was performed and all cross-area flows are marked as passed in validation-state.json. The orchestrator should either: (1) Update the end-to-end-validation handoff to reference the correct commit containing polish validation evidence, or (2) Acknowledge that the cross-area flows were validated across other milestones and the blocking issue is resolved by validation-state.json showing pass status.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance that scrutiny validator handoffs must reference commits that contain evidence for the milestone being validated. Workers should commit validation evidence (screenshots, transcript excerpts, validation-state updates) to the correct milestone's evidence/ directory before completing handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 4 and 5 both show end-to-end-validation handoff referencing wrong commit (191c22c from audit-trail instead of polish). The evidence for cross-area flows exists in validation-state.json (marked pass) but not in a polish-specific commit.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Cross-area flows validated in respective milestones: VAL-CROSS-001 (end-to-end citizen flow), VAL-CROSS-002 (admin reassignment), VAL-CROSS-003 (document lifecycle), VAL-CROSS-004 (schedule change propagation), VAL-CROSS-005 (hold expiration recovery) are all marked as PASSED in validation-state.json. The end-to-end-validation feature aggregates these validations.
sharedStateObservations.reason: Evidence exists in validation-state.json rather than in a dedicated polish evidence directory.

sharedStateObservations.observation: fix-test-infrastructure correctly resolved: The --maxWorkers=1 flag in vitest script prevents SQLite locking. All 223 tests pass when run with this flag.
sharedStateObservations.reason: This was a known infrastructure issue from earlier rounds that is now resolved.

validationStateCrossAreaFlows.note: All cross-area flows validated in respective milestones and marked as pass in validation-state.json
